title: festuca duriuscula var. gracilior
intro: Festuca duriuscula var. gracilior, also known as the slender false bent grass, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Festuca duriuscula var. gracilior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
